title: lagerstroemia duperreana var. saxatilis
intro: Lagerstroemia duperreana var. saxatilis, also known as the crepe myrtle, is a flowering plant species native to Vietnam. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. It has been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
